test.name: Caso de teste 01: Abrir navegador

kw.name: Abrir navegador chrome
kw.doc: Abre uma página do chrome na página de login

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.msg: Firefox driver log is always forced to to: C:\Users\jaime.rosa\Documents\Automação Totvs\testes-integrados\result\ResultadocadastroCliente\geckodriver-1.log

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
kw.msg: Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.
WebDriverException: Message: 'geckodriver' executable needs to be in PATH.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: Caso de teste, abrindo o CRM
test.status: WebDriverException: Message: 'geckodriver' executable needs to be in PATH.

test.name: caso de teste 02: Realizar o login

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
kw.msg: Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: :example: 'Crist Parks'

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Random Int
kw.doc: Generate a random integer between two integers ``min`` and ``max`` inclusive while observing the provided ``step`` value.

kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Postcode
kw.doc: Randomly returns a postcode. :param formatted: True to allow formatted postcodes, else False (default True) :example formatted: '41224-212' '83992-291' '12324322' :example raw: '43920231' '34239530'

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.
